title: CrittPvP
description:
Made for elytrapvp
Has allot of cool features 
Uses Inspirations from other mods
body:
**This is a Mod that that provides multiple features by using inspirations of other mods like CSR but since i did most of the stuff in csr so this is a mod by only myself.
**

**Keybind:**
Press 0 for the Main GUI.
Press Right CTRL while the Main GUI is open for an Explanations GUI.

**Features:**
- Item Switch
- Drop Settings
- Name Tweaks
- Item Tweaks
- Particle Changers
- Player Tweaks
- Counters for FPS and CPS
- Viewmodels
- Glint Changer
- Keystrokes
- ClickSounds
- HUD Tweaks
- Full Bright
